scripts.test:packages: for pkg in FECore FEData FEDesignSystem FEAuth FECityPicker FEMap FECalendar FEPlan FEExplore FESaved FEEventDetail FEAppIntents; do echo "--- $pkg ---" && (cd Packages/$pkg && swift test) || exit 1; done
scripts.test:app: xcodegen generate && if xcode-select -p | grep -q '/Applications/Xcode'; then SIMULATOR_ID="$(xcrun simctl list devices available | awk -F'[()]' '/iPhone 17/ { print $2; exit } /iPhone/ && !fallback { fallback=$2 } END { if (!fallback) exit 0; print fallback }' | head -n 1)"; if [ -n "$SIMULATOR_ID" ]; then xcodebuild -project FamilyEvents.xcodeproj -scheme FamilyEvents -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,id=$SIMULATOR_ID" test; else xcodebuild -project FamilyEvents.xcodeproj -scheme FamilyEvents -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build-for-testing; fi; else echo 'xcodebuild skipped: full Xcode not selected'; fi
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:app
scripts.clean: find Packages -name '.build' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf FamilyEvents.xcodeproj/xcuserdata FamilyEvents.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcuserdata || true
